values: Score direction: higher composite score is better. Waiting time, total travel time, rejections, and idle share are minimized; d_p/d_t is maximized.
S5 uses a stricter maxWaitTime of 900 s. It improves waiting metrics but has one rejected request, so reliability should be discussed explicitly.
d_p/d_t is used as a proxy for environmental efficiency, not a direct emission metric.
